text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, what do I have to help out with today
again? Harvesting crops in the school field,
organizing paperwork, and shopping, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ouch... I'm getting a lot of headaches today.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't just abandon my duties, though... Everyone
is counting on me!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Kita! It's important to rest when you're
sick, but the most important thing is having the
determination to never give up.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
No matter how exhausted you are, you'll be able
to pull through as long as you can sing with all
your heart!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yes, sir! I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black accidentally manages to aggravate
her headache.
